BILE with the girls can be had.


Every afternoon at o'clock the
girls meet in their headquarters on
the NTH floor Of Fraternal Brother
hood hall and make their report Of
their success or failure. The slips
are turned in to the Officers of the
union, who turn them over to the
central labor body.


The telephone company still main
tains it's position and refuses to sign
the agreement given them by the
union.


A boycott was placed upon the Pa
cific States Telephone & Telegraph
company last night by the labor
council, the central body of organ
lied labor in San Francisco.
The company Is now placed upon
the unfair list in San Francisco,
Sacramento, Everett and Spokane,
and the other coast cities are expect
ed to also place boycotts II the COM
pany continues to refuse to come to
terms.
